note: wstETH EIP-2612 permit. Mirrors standard/erc20/permit (t6b_erc20_permit shape) re-pinned to wstETH. wstETH (0x7f39c5…, name() 'Wrapped liquid staked Ether 2.0') is a standard OZ ERC20Permit: verified ABI exposes permit(owner,spender,value,deadline,v,r,s), nonces(address)->uint256, DOMAIN_SEPARATOR()->bytes32 (Etherscan getabi). FLAT wrap-rule case: after filtering signature-machinery (owner/v/r/s) more than one scalar remains, so the typed-data WRAP RULE leaves args_json FLAT ($args.<field> resolve directly against the signed Permit message). Routing keys on (chainId, verifying_contract, primary_type='Permit') — domain_name is metadata only. live_inputs.nonce (onchain_view nonces($tx.to)) populates the schema-required nonce; it degrades to skeleton '0' when the policy-rpc host is unreachable, and the P3 permit policies (amount/spender only) never read nonce, so their verdict is host-independent. selector 0xd505accf also registers the on-chain permit() by-callkey for the rarer user-submitted permit tx.
